# Pull Request

## Related issue

Closes #

## Change

Describe the focused change and the problem it solves.

## Architecture and compatibility

Describe affected modules, contracts, consistency, failure behavior, and migration impact.

## Validation

List tests and review evidence.

## Checklist

- [ ] Scope and approach were agreed before significant implementation.
- [ ] The change is focused and follows repository style.
- [ ] Relevant tests and documentation are updated.
- [ ] Breaking changes include migration and rollback notes.
- [ ] No secrets, private evidence, or unsupported capability claims are included.
